case_title: REILLY STEFEN VS POISTER KARSTIN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARMOUR PHILIP C/O DARWIN MOTORS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REILLY STEFEN AS TO DEFENDANT POISTER KARSTIN ARMOUR PHILIP C/O DARWIN MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO RANDY NEGI POS FILED.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-19-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF FEB-06-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBPENA DUCE STECUM AS TO BOB SHAPIRO POS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REILLY STEFEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT POISTER KARSTIN ARMOUR PHILIP C/O DARWIN MOTORS PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
